title: FCompat_VanillaPlus
description: A mod to balance and connect other mods in my Vanilla+ modpack.
body:
# WELCOME!
This is a compatibility/balance mod created to connect various mods in my Vanilla+ modpack, [which can be found here.](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fyxes-vanilla-modpack) It can be used without the pack, but its intended purpose is to add compatibility between a variety of mods specific to that pack.

![FCVP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/207710679fa2131ab0df24b1709185aff1262027.png)

Current Features: (Check changelogs for a more detailed breakdown)
- [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) Lightroom block is now craftable with [Hardcore Torches](https://modrinth.com/mod/hardcore-torches) Lit Lantern
- [Better Fletching Tables (BFT)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bft) now works with [VariantVanillaBlocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/variant-vanilla-blocks) fletching tables of different woods
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) now compatible with [Fish of Thieves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fish-of-thieves)
  - Fish can be cut into their respective slices (slices added as new items)
  - Fish and Slices can be used where raw_fish are used
  - Fish Slices can be cooked (furnace, smoker, campfire) and both cooked and raw variants can be eaten
- [INMIS](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmis) backpacks can be crafted using any chest from [VariantVanillaBlocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/variant-vanilla-blocks)
- Using the [Tips](https://modrinth.com/mod/tips) mod, various Tips have been added as a way to explain less intuitive new features
- [Chalk]([https://modrinth.com/mod/chalk](https://modrinth.com/mod/chalk)) can now additionally be crafted using diorite.


<details>
<summary>TODO</summary>

- Fix some mods not showing up in JEI
- Fix lectern variants not working with all atlases
- Fix Smithing Table variants not working with Purpur upgrades
- Tips. So many more tips to make.

</details>

## NOTE
- You have my permission to use this mod in your modpacks, as long as you acknowledge that I have _not_ tested this for compatability outside of my own pack. 
- If you have any feedback please send to fyxeincfeedback@gmail.com
